common.securityHint: Your session is protected with secure cookies.

validation.minPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.minName: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_LONG: Password must be at most 128 characters
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_NUMBER: Password must contain at least one number
errors.PASSWORD_MISSING_SPECIAL_CHARACTER: Password must contain at least one special character
errors.NAME_TOO_SHORT: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email address before signing in.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signIn.metaDescription: Sign in to manage orders, addresses, and your personalized shopping experience.
signIn.heroTitle: Manage your orders and shopping experience
signIn.heroDescription: Sign in to track orders, save shipping details, and continue shopping faster.

benefits.orders: Track order status in one place
benefits.profile: Save your profile and shipping details
benefits.secure: Keep sessions and account data protected

signIn.cardDescription: Enter your email and password to continue.
signIn.oauthError: Failed to sign in with {provider}. Please try again.

signUp.metaDescription: Create an account for a faster and more personalized shopping experience.
signUp.heroTitle: Start your personalized shopping journey with Fashio
signUp.heroDescription: Create an account to save favorite products, shipping details, and shop more conveniently.

benefits.faster: Check out faster with saved details
benefits.preferences: Manage preferences and shopping details easily
benefits.secure: Keep your account and sessions secure

signUp.cardDescription: Fill in the details below to get started.

verifyEmail.metaDescription: Verify your email address to sign in securely.
verifyEmail.heroDescription: Verify your email address before signing in with your password.

benefits.secure: Protect your account from unauthorized use
benefits.fast: Verify in one click from your inbox
benefits.controlled: Request a new link whenever you need one

verifyEmail.cardDescription: Enter your email address to receive a verification link.
verifyEmail.resendHint: Check your inbox and spam folder after sending the link.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: If an unverified account exists for this email, a new verification link has been sent.
verifyEmail.resendError: We could not send a verification email. Please try again.
verifyEmail.expiredToken: This verification link has expired. Request a new one below.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid. Request a new one below.

email.subject: Verify your Fashio email address
email.preheader: Confirm your email address to secure your Fashio account.
email.heading: Verify your email address
email.intro: Confirm your email address to unlock secure sign-in and protect your account.
email.stepTwo: Return to Fashio and sign in securely.
email.expiry: This verification link expires in one hour.
email.securityNotice: For your security, never share this verification link with anyone.
email.fallbackLabel: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
email.ignoreNotice: If you did not create a Fashio account, you can safely ignore this email.
